config package¶

Submodules¶

config.data_config module¶

class config.data_config.DataFilterConfig(*, min_latitude: int | float = -90, max_latitude: int | float = 90, min_longitude: int | float = -180, max_longitude: int | float = 180, min_depth: int | float = 0, max_depth: int | float | None = None)[source]¶

Bases : BaseModel

max_depth: int | float | None¶
max_latitude: int | float¶
max_longitude: int | float¶
min_depth: int | float¶
min_latitude: int | float¶
min_longitude: int | float¶
model_computed_fields: ClassVar[Dict[str, ComputedFieldInfo]] = {}¶

A dictionary of computed field names and their corresponding ComputedFieldInfo objects.

model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

model_fields: ClassVar[Dict[str, FieldInfo]] = {'max_depth': FieldInfo(annotation=Union[int, float, NoneType], required=False, default=None), 'max_latitude': FieldInfo(annotation=Union[int, float], required=False, default=90), 'max_longitude': FieldInfo(annotation=Union[int, float], required=False, default=180), 'min_depth': FieldInfo(annotation=Union[int, float], required=False, default=0), 'min_latitude': FieldInfo(annotation=Union[int, float], required=False, default=-90), 'min_longitude': FieldInfo(annotation=Union[int, float], required=False, default=-180)}¶

Metadata about the fields defined on the model, mapping of field names to [FieldInfo][pydantic.fields.FieldInfo] objects.

This replaces Model.__fields__ from Pydantic V1.

classmethod validate_depth(value)[source]¶
classmethod validate_latitude(value)[source]¶
classmethod validate_longitude(value)[source]¶
config.data_config.get_data_config(config_file: Path | None = WindowsPath('D:/Dev/CHS-CSB_Processing/CONFIG_data_transformation.toml')) → DataFilterConfig[source]¶

Retournes la configuration pour la transformation des données.

Paramètres:

config_file – (Optional[Path]) Le chemin du fichier de configuration.

Renvoie:

(DataFilterConfig) La configuration de transformation des données.

config.data_config.load_config(config_file: Path | None = WindowsPath('D:/Dev/CHS-CSB_Processing/CONFIG_data_transformation.toml')) → dict[str, dict[str, dict[str, dict[str, int | float]]]][source]¶

Retournes les données de configuration du fichier TOML.

Paramètres:

config_file – (Optional[Path]) Le chemin du fichier de configuration.

Renvoie:

(DataConfigDict) Les données de configuration.

config.iwls_api_config.get_api_config(config_file: Path | None = WindowsPath('D:/Dev/CHS-CSB_Processing/CONFIG_iwls_API.toml')) → IWLSAPIConfig[source]¶

config_file (Path) – Le fichier de configuration.

Un objet APIConfig.
